Usage: yt-dlp [OPTIONS] URL [URL...]

General Options:
  -h, --help                         Print this help text and exit
  --version                          Print program version and exit
  -U, --update                       Update this program to latest version
  -o TEMPLATE, --output TEMPLATE     Output filename template
  -f FORMAT, --format FORMAT         Video format code
  --cookies FILE                     Netscape cookies file
  --proxy URL                        Use the specified HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy
  --download-archive FILE            Download only videos not listed in archive
  --no-playlist                      Download only the video if the URL refers to a playlist
